hero.title: Building Scalable Digital Systems
hero.name: Abdulrahman Khalid Abdullah Redhwan
hero.desc: Senior Full Stack Developer and Systems Architect with 10+ years of experience specializing in backend architecture, high-performance APIs, and scalable web applications.

about.title: Architecting robust systems for the modern web.
about.p1: I am Abdulrahman Khalid Abdullah Redhwan, a Full Stack Software Developer with more than 10 years of experience. I specialize primarily in backend development, system architecture, and building scalable web applications that stand the test of time.
about.p2: My expertise spans multiple programming languages and frameworks, with a proven track record of building modern web platforms, e-commerce systems, robust APIs, and microservices. I am deeply passionate about clean code, design patterns, performance optimization, and Big O analysis.

philosophy.title: My Philosophy
philosophy.p1: I believe that great software is built on a foundation of maintainability and scalability. My approach focuses on performance optimization and the implementation of robust design patterns to solve complex architectural challenges.
philosophy.p2: Whether it's transitioning legacy systems to modern architectures or building microservices from scratch, I prioritize clean code and system resilience to ensure long-term success.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.desc: A showcase of my work in building scalable applications, e-commerce integrations, and specialized web tools.

more.title: Looking for more?
more.desc: I have worked on numerous software systems including desktop applications, AI-powered tools, and complex CMS platforms. Let's discuss how my experience can help your project.

ecommerce.title: nopCommerce Integrations
ecommerce.desc: Building custom payment and shipping integrations for nopCommerce and Smartstore platforms.

ai.title: AI Background Remover
ai.desc: Web application built with Python, Flask, and rembg for automatic image background removal.

university.title: University CMS Systems
university.desc: Architected and built the Ahgaff University website using .NET/Umbraco, later transitioned to Python/Django.

microservices.title: SrmedEco Platform
microservices.desc: A microservices-based e-commerce system providing digital solutions and complex integrations.

exp1.desc: Providing software systems, hosting services, and e-commerce solutions. Leading web development and architectural design for diverse client needs.

exp2.desc: Developed a microservices-based e-commerce platform. Focused on digital solutions, API integrations, and system scalability.

exp3.desc: Built the university website using .NET and Umbraco. Later led the transition to a modern system using Python and Django.

exp4.desc: Worked on various web applications, custom plugins for payment/shipping providers, and desktop applications.
